sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Understanding the Setup: (ATHS) and Scalable Risk
authors: Quantitative Research Desk - Contributor Editor: Thomas H. Kee Jr.
feed.summary: This article analyzes Athene Holding Ltd. (ATHS) 7.250% Fixed-rate Reset Junior Subordinated Debentures Due 2064, indicating strong near-term sentiment but a neutral mid and long-term outlook. AI models have generated three distinct trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—each with specific entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis highlights an exceptional 9.0:1 risk-reward short setup, targeting a 2.5% downside versus 0.3% risk.

feed.title: Argan Inc director Leimkuhler sells $5.05m in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Argan Inc. director William F. Leimkuhler sold 8,444 shares of common stock for $5.05 million on April 13, 2026. This transaction occurred while the company's stock, AGX, was trading near its 52-week high, having returned 317% over the past year. InvestingPro analysis suggests the company may be overvalued, despite a strong Q4 fiscal year 2026 earnings beat and an expanded share repurchase program.

feed.title: Arbutus Receives U.S. FDA Fast Track Designation for Imdusiran for the Treatment of Chronic Hepatitis B
feed.summary: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation announced that the U.S. FDA has granted Fast Track designation for imdusiran, a drug for chronic hepatitis B. This designation will facilitate the development and expedited review of imdusiran, which has shown potential to achieve functional cure in trials. The company plans to work closely with the FDA to advance the drug, addressing a significant unmet medical need for the over 250 million people affected by chronic HBV worldwide.

feed.title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. buys Safari Flower Co. in $26.5M deal
feed.summary: Aurora Cannabis Inc. has acquired Safari Flower Co. in a stock-and-cash deal worth $26.5 million, which includes a contingent $2 million cash payment. This acquisition provides Aurora with an EU GMP certified indoor cultivation and manufacturing facility in Ontario, aiming to boost its capacity for international medical cannabis markets like Germany, Australia, Poland, and the United Kingdom. Aurora's executive chair Miguel Martin stated that this move is a significant step in growing the company's international medical cannabis business and increasing its global market share.

feed.title: Dollar General’s media network rolls out AI store audio program
feed.summary: Dollar General is expanding its in-store audio media network to approximately 6,000 additional locations, bringing its total to 12,000 stores, through a new collaboration with QSIC. This initiative will leverage AI to deliver localized, real-time messaging and curated music, aiming to enhance the customer shopping experience and create value for brand partners. The move is a key component of Dollar General's broader growth strategy, focusing on digital initiatives and improving sales growth and customer loyalty, especially in the rural communities it serves.

feed.title: Did Anthropic Just Crown CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks the AI Cybersecurity Stock Winners?
feed.summary: Anthropic has launched "Project Glasswing," partnering with a select group of tech companies, including cybersecurity leaders CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks, to address software vulnerabilities using its advanced AI model, Claude Mythos. This collaboration positions CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks as key players in developing AI-powered cybersecurity solutions against evolving AI threats. The article suggests that this partnership solidifies their market leadership and makes their stocks attractive investments, especially given their current performance.

feed.title: Apple may use OLED screens for iPad Air next year: report (AAPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: A new report suggests that Apple is likely to incorporate OLED screens in the next iteration of its iPad Air, potentially in the coming year. This change in display technology could mark a significant update for the device. Shares of Apple were observed to be largely unchanged in premarket trading following the news.

feed.title: CrowdStrike led Gartner's SIEM report in 5-star ratings and reviews
feed.summary: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) report. The company received the most 5-star ratings and verified reviews among all vendors, attributed to its Falcon Next-Gen SIEM platform which offers leading detection efficacy, cost efficiency, and agentic SOC transformation. Customers highlight the product's ease of deployment, comprehensive network visibility, and automation capabilities as key benefits.

feed.title: GE warns ITEP engine program needs ‘little bit more money’ for testing in FY27 budget
feed.summary: GE Aerospace officials stated that the Improved Turbine Engine Program (ITEP), which develops engines for Blackhawk and Apache fleets, will require additional funding in fiscal year 2027 to complete qualification testing. Despite significant progress with current funding, the Pentagon's FY27 budget request zeroed out funding for ITEP, potentially delaying the 2028 qualification timeline. GE is also in discussions with the Army to accelerate ITEP production for Blackhawks, potentially moving up the initial operational capability from FY29.

feed.title: Five things we learned from BetMGM’s Q1 trading update
feed.summary: Joe Levy reports on BetMGM's latest Q1 trading update, highlighting key takeaways from the operator's earnings call. The article covers insights into increased igaming competition and comments on the future of prediction markets, which are described as potentially leading to "shark-on-shark violence."

feed.title: Former Verisk CEO Scott Stephenson Joins ZestyAI's Board of Directors as Insurance Accelerates into the AI Era
feed.summary: Former Verisk CEO Scott Stephenson has joined ZestyAI's Board of Directors as the insurance industry increasingly adopts AI. Stephenson, who previously led Verisk to significant growth and market capitalization, will bring his expertise in data modernization to ZestyAI. His appointment coincides with ZestyAI's cash flow positive growth, doubling of product usage, and expansion of its client base, reinforcing its position as a leader in AI-powered risk intelligence for insurers.

feed.title: TeraWulf, BRP And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures were down on Wednesday, with several stocks moving lower in pre-market trading. TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ: WULF) saw its shares dip after reporting preliminary Q1 results, announcing a common stock offering, and forecasting lower Q1 revenue and adjusted EBITDA compared to the previous year. BRP Inc. (NASDAQ: DOO) also experienced a significant pre-market drop after suspending its FY27 guidance due to changes in the U.S. tariff environment.

feed.title: American Eagle launches summer campaign with Sydney Sweeney
feed.summary: American Eagle Outfitters Inc. announced its "Syd for Short: American Eagle Jean Shorts" summer campaign featuring actress Sydney Sweeney. The campaign highlights jean shorts as a summer essential, with Sweeney showcasing various styles in casual settings, and will offer over 200 shorts styles, including "Syd's Shop." American Eagle is also continuing its charitable partnership with Crisis Text Line, donating 100% of the purchase price from "Syd Jean" and "Syd Short" items to the nonprofit.

feed.title: Insurance claims decline further in 2025 as losses grow more complex, Verisk reports
feed.summary: A Verisk report indicates that insurance claims continued to decline in 2025, with homeowners' claims falling significantly, partly due to a quiet hurricane season. However, the report highlights an increase in complex and prolonged losses due to large-scale events like the Los Angeles wildfires and the growing influence of emerging risks such as those from the gig economy, silica, PFAS, and e-bikes. The data suggests that while claim volumes decreased, the nature of risks has become more concentrated and challenging to manage, leading to more severe losses.

feed.title: Equinix Pushes AI Into Network Layer With Fabric Intelligence
feed.summary: Equinix has launched Fabric Intelligence, an AI-driven control layer designed to automate network connectivity across distributed environments for AI workloads. The platform aims to move network operations from manual, ticket-driven processes to more autonomous, predictive orchestration using AI agents and natural-language interfaces. This initiative addresses the growing friction point where advanced AI compute vastly outpaces static network operations, which could otherwise limit AI deployments.

feed.title: Salesforce bets on conversation as the new interface for developers
feed.summary: Salesforce is introducing "Headless 360" and "Agentforce Vibe 2.0" to transform how developers interact with its platform, emphasizing conversational interfaces and AI agents. Headless 360 allows developers to build using APIs and AI from various sources, while Agentforce Vibe 2.0 provides an AI builder for creating agents with multimodel support and full UI control. Additionally, Salesforce is expanding Agent Fabric to enable scalable, multivendor AI orchestration, aiming for more efficient and optimized agent networks.

feed.title: Sydney Sweeney and American Eagle are Back Together
feed.summary: American Eagle (AE) has launched its summer campaign, "Syd for Short: American Eagle Jean Shorts," featuring Sydney Sweeney. The campaign emphasizes jean shorts as a timeless summer essential, showcasing Sweeney's effortless style in casual settings. Continuously supporting Crisis Text Line, custom denim styles from the campaign will donate 100% of purchase price to the organization, featuring a butterfly detail in honor of domestic violence survivors.

feed.title: AstroNova Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: AstroNova reported a slight year-over-year revenue increase in Q4 2026 to $37.5 million, driven by growth in the Product Identification segment, with the second half of fiscal 2026 showing improved performance and momentum carrying into fiscal 2027. The company is focusing on stabilizing operations, improving cash generation, and reducing debt, while also evaluating strategic alternatives including potential sale or merger. Strategic changes, including a refined go-to-market strategy in Product ID and strong demand for TopRider solutions in aerospace, are expected to drive mid-single-digit revenue growth and EBITDA margin expansion in fiscal 2027, with an anticipated $2 million gross profit benefit from an expiring royalty obligation.

feed.title: Raytheon's new helicopter sensor mapped terrain in total darkness
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, successfully completed the first flight test of its RAIVEN Staring sensing system on a UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. The system used three sensors to map urban, marsh, and coastline terrain in zero illumination, providing 270-degree situational awareness. Additional flight tests are planned throughout 2026 for this next-generation electro-optical and infrared (EO/IR) solution produced in McKinney, Texas.

feed.title: Travel platform handles half its chat cases with AI, cuts support time
feed.summary: Salesforce announced an expanded collaboration with Engine, a leading business travel platform, utilizing Agentforce and Slack to enhance customer service. Engine now handles 50% of chat cases with AI, reducing average support time by 15% and cutting sales research time by 40%. This integration has allowed humans and AI agents to work together, streamlining travel experiences and improving efficiency.

feed.title: Agilent Showcases Cancer Research Solutions at AACR 2026
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies will present its latest innovations in cancer research and diagnostics at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. Key highlights include new cell imaging technology, AI-enabled software for real-time cell analysis, and collaborations for targeted long-read sequencing in oncology. The company also continues its support for early-career researchers through a fundraising initiative with the AACR Foundation.

feed.title: Weeks to minutes: Equinix adds AI agent for network setup
feed.summary: Equinix has launched Fabric Intelligence, an AI-native operational layer designed to automate and optimize multi-cloud, data center, and edge networking for AI workloads. This new offering aims to simplify the complexities of modern AI workflows, significantly reducing network setup times from weeks to minutes through its Fabric Super Agent component. Fabric Intelligence leverages Equinix's global network of 280 data centers and 77 metros to provide a resilient, efficient, and adaptive backbone for distributed AI, with a particular focus on enhancing connectivity and management for AI-driven operations.

feed.title: Teledyne Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast Details
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. A press release detailing the earnings will be issued prior to the market opening on the same day. Investors can access the live webcast and a subsequent replay through the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Nicotine-dependence drug moves to Ohio production ahead of FDA refiling
feed.summary: Achieve Life Sciences has completed the transfer of cytisinicline manufacturing to Adare Pharma Solutions in Vandalia, Ohio, establishing U.S.-based production and supply-chain redundancy. This move comes after a third-party manufacturing facility received an Official Action Indicated (OAI) classification from the FDA. Achieve expects a Complete Response Letter by June 20, 2026, plans to resubmit its New Drug Application naming Adare in Q4 2026, and anticipates a commercial launch in the first half of 2027.

feed.title: Philip Morris International to Host Webcast of 2026 First-Quarter Results
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PMI) will host a live audio webcast on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss its 2026 First-Quarter financial results, which will be released at approximately 7:00 a.m. ET the same day. The webcast will feature Emmanuel Babeau, Group CFO, discussing financial results and holding a Q&A session with investors. PMI, a global consumer goods company, is focused on a smoke-free future, with smoke-free products accounting for 41.5% of its 2025 net revenues.

feed.title: Transense wins key role in APC backed Smart Motor project with Cummins
feed.summary: Transense has secured a significant role in the Smart Motor project, which is backed by the Advanced Propulsion Centre (APC). This project involves collaboration with Cummins, a major manufacturer of engines and power generation products. The partnership highlights Transense's contribution to advanced motor technology.

feed.title: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Align Technology, American Tower, Autodesk, Autoliv, Chime Financial, Cloudflare, SolarEdge Technologies, Zoetis, and More
feed.summary: This article details top Wall Street analyst research calls for Wednesday, April 15, 2026, including upgrades, downgrades, and new initiations for various companies like American Tower, SolarEdge Technologies, Align Technology, and Autodesk. It also provides a market recap, highlighting positive movements in stocks, gold, and cryptocurrencies, alongside declines in treasury yields and oil prices. The market's positive sentiment was attributed to improving inflation data and geopolitical factors.

feed.title: Zacks Research Issues Optimistic Outlook for AR Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has significantly raised its near-term earnings estimates for Antero Resources (AR), boosting Q3 2026 EPS to $0.88 and full-year 2026 EPS to $3.43, alongside upward revisions for several 2026/2027 quarters. This optimistic outlook follows Antero's recent beat on quarterly expectations and has led several other firms to raise their price targets and ratings, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The stock currently trades around $36.12 with a P/E of 17.88 and a market capitalization of approximately $11.1 billion.

feed.title: Falling Stock Price, Rising Dividend: UnitedHealth Fits the Dogs of the Dow Profile
feed.summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) exemplifies the "Dogs of the Dow" strategy due to its significant stock price decline and rising dividend yield, making it an attractive contrarian investment. Despite recent challenges, management and Wall Street analysts are confident in a turnaround, supported by strong 2026 guidance and insider buying. However, risks such as a high medical care ratio and declining membership persist, alongside potential legal actions.

feed.title: People moves: Betsy Fishbone promoted to chief legal officer at Colgate-Palmolive
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has appointed Betsy Fishbone as its new chief legal officer and secretary, succeeding Jennifer Daniels. This article also details several other significant legal and governance appointments across various companies, including Michael Ferrier at Nauticus Robotics, Timothy Williams at Geron, Michael Isaacs at Prothena, Matthew Lang at Structure Theraputics, and Andrew Newbury at Gemdale Gold. Additionally, David Woodcock has been named director of the SEC's Division of Enforcement.

feed.title: Prairiewood Capital LLC Purchases 56,465 Shares of Ares Capital Corporation $ARCC
feed.summary: Prairiewood Capital LLC increased its stake in Ares Capital Corporation (NASDAQ:ARCC) by 22.9% in the 4th quarter, purchasing an additional 56,465 shares, bringing its total holdings to 303,282 shares valued at $6.135 million. The article also details other institutional investor activity, Ares Capital's stock performance, recent earnings, dividend announcement, and insider trading by company executives. Analyst ratings for ARCC are mixed, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a price target of $21.38.

feed.title: INCY Reiterates by HC Wainwright & Co. -- Price Target Maintained at $135
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated a Buy rating for Incyte (INCY), maintaining a price target of $135.00, signaling confidence in the biopharmaceutical company's growth potential. GuruFocus assesses INCY as 1.1% undervalued with a strong GF Score™ of 93/100, driven by exceptional financial strength and profitability. Despite recent insider selling, the stock presents a solid investment opportunity due to its undervaluation and robust financials.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Upgraded at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade is supported by other analysts who have also issued "overweight" or "buy" ratings with price targets ranging from $165.00 to $200.00. The company's recent strong earnings performance and its pivotal role in AI infrastructure are highlighted as key drivers for this positive outlook.

feed.title: EQT (NYSE:EQT) Lowered to Hold Rating by Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup downgraded EQT (NYSE:EQT) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating, as reported by Zacks.com. This comes amidst varied analyst opinions, with several firms reiterating "buy" or "outperform" ratings and target price adjustments. The article also details EQT's recent stock performance, earnings, insider transactions, and institutional investor activity, alongside key news impacting the company.

feed.title: Aurora Cannabis Buys Safari Flower to Boost EU GMP Supply for Global Medical Markets
feed.summary: Aurora Cannabis (TSE:ACB) has acquired Safari Flower Company for $26.5 million, adding an EU GMP certified cultivation facility to its network. This acquisition aims to expand Aurora's EU GMP capacity for international medical markets and is expected to contribute positively to Adjusted EBITDA from fiscal 2027. The deal strengthens Aurora's position in high-margin global medical cannabis markets and supports its strategy to capture greater international market share.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Royal Caribbean Group to $349 From $383, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) to $349 from $383, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analysts also revising their targets for the cruise company. The article also touches upon a softening demand in the European cruise market as noted by UBS and Morgan Stanley.

feed.title: São Paulo hotel performance jumped for Design Week
feed.summary: São Paulo's hotel industry experienced a significant boost in March 2026, largely due to Design Week, achieving record-high ADR and RevPAR. Occupancy increased by 13% to 67.8%, and ADR rose by 7.4% to BRL871.48, with peak performance on March 11. Other events like Capacity LATAM, ST Alphe Brazil, and the WST Skateboarding World Championship also contributed to strong results throughout the month.

feed.title: J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at BTIG Research
feed.summary: BTIG Research upgraded J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade comes amidst other recent analyst adjustments, with the stock currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $117.94. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating consensus estimates, and institution investors have also been active in the stock.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Financial Companies: Chubb (CB) and Goldman Sachs Group (GS)
feed.summary: Analysts from Bank of America Securities have provided insights on Chubb (CB) and Goldman Sachs Group (GS). Joshua Shanker maintained a Sell rating on Chubb with a $271.00 price target, while Ebrahim Poonawala reiterated a Buy rating on Goldman Sachs Group with a $1050.00 price target. The consensus for Chubb is a Moderate Buy with a $340.53 average target, and for Goldman Sachs, it's also a Moderate Buy with a $971.18 average target, representing a 10.9% upside.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises BlackRock stock price target on growth outlook
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) stock to $1,393 from $1,368, maintaining an Overweight rating. This decision is based on an outlook for mid-single-digit organic revenue growth and operating margin expansion, driven by structural tailwinds such as private market democratization and technology monetization. The firm projects a 15% EPS compound annual growth rate from 2025-2028, noting that BlackRock trades at a discount despite its superior growth profile.

feed.title: Citi Maintains EOG Resources(EOG.US) With Hold Rating, Cuts Target Price to $142
feed.summary: Citi has reiterated its Hold rating for EOG Resources (EOG.US) but has lowered its target price for the stock to $142. This adjustment suggests a revised outlook on the company's valuation or future performance by the investment bank.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) is anticipated to report increased first-quarter earnings and revenue when it releases results before the market opens on Thursday, April 16. Analysts expect earnings per share of $1.08, up from $0.77 year-over-year, and revenue of $2.15 billion. Several analysts from firms like JP Morgan, Evercore ISI Group, and Morgan Stanley have recently updated their ratings and price targets for CFG stock.

feed.title: Spectrum Asset Management Inc. NB CA Trims Stock Position in Linde PLC $LIN
feed.summary: Spectrum Asset Management Inc. NB CA significantly reduced its stake in Linde PLC by 45.1% in Q4, selling 3,876 shares and holding 4,714 shares valued at $2.01 million. Despite this reduction by one investor, other institutional investors have increased their positions in Linde, and Wall Street analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $521.60. Linde also reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: PNC Profit Rises on Robust Client Activity
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group reported higher first-quarter profit and revenue, driven by robust client activity. The Pittsburgh-based bank recorded a net income of $1.72 billion, or $4.13 a share, with total revenue increasing 13% to $6.17 billion. Net interest income and noninterest income also saw significant increases, and total loans grew by 13%.

feed.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) Downgraded by Zacks Research to Strong Sell
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) from a "hold" to a "strong sell" rating. This comes despite several other analysts maintaining "buy" or "overweight" ratings and an average target price of $122.00. The article also highlights recent insider stock sales totaling over $6 million and institutional investor activity.

feed.title: TransDigm Group prices $1.5 billion in new debt to fund acquisition and share repurchases
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated has priced an incremental $1.5 billion in new debt to partially fund its acquisition of Stellant Systems, Inc., cover $800 million in share repurchases, and related expenses. This new debt includes $500 million in 6.125% Senior Subordinated Notes due 2034, adding to its existing debt of approximately $30 billion. Despite being considered overvalued with elevated debt, the company maintains strong gross profit margins and plans further credit agreement amendments for additional term loans.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Steady In Premarket Trading; BRP, Aramark Lag
feed.summary: The S&P 500 futures showed little movement in premarket trading. This indicates a quiet start to the trading day for the broader market. Companies like BRP and Aramark, however, are lagging, suggesting specific downward pressures on their stock performances.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Steady in Premarket Trading; BRP, Aramark Lag
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures remained steady in premarket trading. Meanwhile, Snap Inc. and D-Wave Quantum Inc. saw significant gains of 10.8% and 8.1% respectively, ahead of the U.S. stock market open.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Energy Companies: Valero Energy (VLO), EOG Resources (EOG) and Chevron (CVX)
feed.summary: Three analysts recently issued bullish sentiments on Valero Energy (VLO), EOG Resources (EOG), and Chevron (CVX). Wells Fargo maintained a Buy rating on Valero Energy and EOG Resources, while BMO Capital maintained a Buy rating on Chevron. The reports highlight price targets and average analyst consensus ratings, indicating potential upsides for all three energy companies.

feed.title: Expedia Group Reveals ‘The AI Trust Gap’: Travelers Embrace AI for Planning but Rely on Trusted Brands to Book
feed.summary: Expedia Group's "The AI Trust Gap" report indicates that while travelers are increasingly comfortable using AI for trip planning and discovery (53% for suggestions, 40% for itineraries), they overwhelmingly prefer trusted travel brands for actual booking. The survey of over 5,700 adults across the U.S., U.K., and India found that 68% would rather book with a trusted brand than an AI chatbot, citing concerns over loss of control, data privacy, and potential poor customer service if issues arise. This suggests a challenge for the travel industry: leveraging AI for innovation in discovery while reinforcing trust during transactions.
